name: Giants Fall: Germany and the Netherlands Crash Out on Penalties
angle: The Round of 32 opened with carnage: Paraguay knocked out four-time champions Germany on penalties in Foxborough while Morocco eliminated the Netherlands from the spot in Monterrey, both on the night of 29 June, a day after Canada reached the last 16 for the first time in their history.

questions.question: Canada reached the World Cup knockout stage for the first time in their history. Which nation did they beat to do it?
Five-time world champions Brazil came from behind to win 2-1 in the last 32. Which nation did they knock out?
Paraguay eliminated four-time champions Germany in the Round of 32. How was the tie settled?

options.D: An own goal in extra time

questions.question: Who scored the 92nd-minute winner that sent Canada past South Africa and into the last 16?
Trailing Japan at half-time, Brazil turned it around late. Who scored their stoppage-time winner?
Japan led Brazil for much of the game thanks to a first-half opener. Which midfielder put them ahead?
Which manager saw his Germany side dumped out of the World Cup at the Round of 32?
Paraguay's shootout hero saved twice to knock out Germany. Which goalkeeper was it?
Who converted the decisive sudden-death penalty to complete Paraguay's stunning win over Germany?
On the same night Germany went out, Morocco eliminated which European heavyweight on penalties?
Who scored the goal that put the Netherlands ahead against Morocco before the Dutch were pegged back?
Morocco forced extra time with a stoppage-time equaliser against the Netherlands. Who headed it in?
Who slotted home the winning penalty as Morocco knocked the Netherlands out of the World Cup?
Germany's exit made them the first of the tournament's traditional heavyweights to fall. At which stage were they knocked out?
In the Round of 32, France faced which Nordic side?
